title: jussiaea suffruticosa var. ligustrifolia
intro: Jussiaea suffruticosa var. ligustrifolia, also known as water-hyssop, is a plant species that belongs to the family Nyctaginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Jussiaea suffruticosa var. ligustrifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
